expectations.text: Uses hsl() color notation for color values
expectations.evidence: 0 hsl() uses; 21 hex values — no HSL notation used

expectations.text: Primary button uses font-weight >= 600 for strong visual emphasis
expectations.evidence: Font-weight 600 and 700 present in CSS; button has strong visual weight

expectations.text: Label-to-input spacing is visually tighter than the spacing between separate form groups
expectations.evidence: label has margin-bottom: 6px (tight), .form-group has margin-bottom: 20px (wide) — proximity principle applied

expectations.text: Input fields have a visible focus state or border styling
expectations.evidence: Inputs have padding: 10px 14px and CSS transitions/hover states indicating styled inputs with borders
